title: Usage Stats: Add Yearly View in Insights

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In the current Insights view, usage metrics are only available by week or month. It would be incredibly helpful to have a yearly view option to track broader adoption trends and long-term activity patterns.

What are you trying to achieve

*Understand big-picture engagement and platform adoption over time.

*Identify annual trends and seasonality in usage.

*Provide executive-friendly reporting without exporting and manually stitching together monthly data.

This enhancement would make Insights much more powerful for strategic planning and leadership reporting.
